note: v0.14.0 changelog entry. Three slices: (A) classifier-safe /gogo:done skill bash (guarded scoped-find rewrites + TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm lint, textual — no diagram); (B) one contract.Feature.WaitingForInput() predicate read by three read-only display sites (renderCard ⏸ cue, gogo status WAIT column, viewBoard │ column borders); (C) a thin launched /gogo:accept routed via launch.ActionAccept so the board's m clears the plan-acceptance gate. Diagrams carried over from the member's report/manifest.json, flattened to slug-prefixed filenames.

diagrams.title: unattended-ops-input-signals: One WaitingForInput() predicate -> three read-only display sites + bordered columns
unattended-ops-input-signals: Board control surface: move-guard -> delegated launch; ActionAccept fills the plan-acceptance gap (Slice C)
unattended-ops-input-signals: Status lifecycle: the three waiting-for-input gates vs the auto transitions
unattended-ops-input-signals: Board accept end to end: m -> ActionAccept -> launched /gogo:accept -> gogo-plan recording -> plan-accepted
